MewXAI vs OpenRouter

Compare MewXAI and OpenRouter: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

MewXAI

Chinese AI painting tool focused on anime styles. Free daily credits, great for avatars and wallpapers.

Pros

  • ✓Good anime results
  • ✓Enough free credits
  • ✓Diverse styles
  • ✓Great for avatars and wallpapers

Cons

  • ✗Anime-focused styles
  • ✗Weak at realistic styles
  • ✗Relatively simple features

Key Features

Anime StyleText to ImageAvatar GenerationWallpaper GenerationMultiple anime styles
View Details →

OpenRouter

API aggregation platform — one endpoint to access them all. 27 free models, accessible from China without VPN. Switch between backends by just changing the model name. Free tier: 50 requests/day, unlock 1000/day with $10 top-up.

Pros

  • ✓Accessible from China without VPN
  • ✓27 free models available
  • ✓OpenAI-compatible format, switch models by changing name
  • ✓Diverse model selection across providers

Cons

  • ✗Free tier limited to 50 requests/day
  • ✗Unlocking 1000/day requires $10 top-up
  • ✗Free model quality varies

Key Features

27 Free ModelsChina Direct AccessOpenAI-Compatible APIUnified Model SwitchingDeepSeek/Qwen/Llama Support
View Details →
